summary: Comprehensive testing of Anti-AI Defense System agent download feature completed successfully. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed login, dashboard, and Agents page with download button all working correctly. The defender_installer.py script contains all expected security tools (Nmap, Suricata, Falco, YARA, ClamAV, packet capture, data recovery).
passed_tests: API root endpoint returns 200 with operational status
Login with admin@defender.io credentials works correctly
Duplicate email registration correctly rejected with 400
Installer script contains packet capture (scapy) references
Installer script contains data recovery references
Installer script is valid Python syntax
Installer script has cloud API URL configuration
Dashboard stats endpoint works with authentication
Agents list endpoint works with authentication
Discovered hosts endpoint works with authentication
Download Agent button visible and clickable
Download Agent button triggers file download
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent download feature fully tested and working. The defender_installer.py script is a comprehensive single-file installer that includes: Nmap for network scanning, Suricata and Falco for intrusion detection, YARA and ClamAV for malware detection, scapy for packet capture, and data recovery tools. The download endpoint at /api/agent/download serves this installer correctly. Frontend Agents page shows connected agents list and has a working Download Agent button.

features_verified.agent_download_endpoint: Working - returns defender_installer.py with all security tools
features_verified.dashboard: Working - displays threat stats and activity
features_verified.agents_page: Working - shows connected agents and download button
